title: Lesson Quiz: Insurance and Risk Protection
description: Assessment of the concept that Health, auto, life, and property insurance basics.

questions.prompt: Which type of insurance is most directly connected to vehicle-related risk?

choices.feedback: Life insurance is connected to financial support after a death, not vehicle-related risk.
Correct. Auto insurance is associated with vehicle-related losses and liability.
Health insurance is connected to medical costs.

choices.text: Property insurance only for medical bills
choices.feedback: That is not the best match for vehicle-related risk.

questions.prompt: Insurance can help reduce the financial shock of an unexpected loss.

choices.feedback: Insurance is designed to help reduce the financial shock of covered losses.
Correct. Insurance helps manage the financial impact of risk.

questions.prompt: If a monthly insurance premium is $70, how much is paid over 12 months?

choices.feedback: Multiply the monthly premium by 12 carefully.

questions.prompt: What is the strongest reason a person might choose insurance coverage?

choices.text: To remove every possible risk permanently
choices.feedback: Insurance can reduce financial risk, but it does not remove all risk permanently.

choices.text: To avoid thinking about future financial needs
choices.feedback: Insurance is part of financial planning, not a way to ignore planning.

choices.text: To guarantee that no costly unexpected event will ever happen
choices.feedback: Insurance helps manage financial impact, but it does not guarantee that unexpected events will never happen.

choices.text: To reduce the financial impact of a costly unexpected event
choices.feedback: Correct. Insurance can reduce the financial impact of major covered losses.

questions.prompt: Which insurance type is most directly connected to protecting a home or belongings?

choices.feedback: Correct. Property insurance is associated with protecting homes or belongings.
Health insurance is associated with medical expenses.

choices.text: Auto insurance only for hospital costs
choices.feedback: That is not the best match for protecting a home or belongings.
That is not an appropriate match for property protection.
